zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert II de Bellême於從1052年到1056年出生在法國時，他的父親Roger de Montgomery34歲，母親Mabel Talvas31歲。他於1087年9月9日之前與Agnes de Ponthieu結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1118年5月8日在英國多瑟特瓦雷哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert II de Bellême was born from 1052 to 1056, in France, his father, Roger de Montgomery, was 34 and his mother, Mabel Talvas, was 31. He married Agnes de Ponthieu before 9 September 1087. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 8 May 1118, in Wareham, Dorset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert II de Bellême est né du 1052 au 1056, à France, son père, Roger de Montgomery, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Mabel Talvas, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Agnes de Ponthieu avant 9 septembre 1087. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 8 mai 1118, à Wareham, Dorset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert II de Bellême von 1052 bis 1056 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger de Montgomery 34 und seine Mutter Mabel Talvas 31. Er hat vor 9. September 1087 Agnes de Ponthieu geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 8. Mai 1118 in Wareham, Dorset, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert II de Bellême è nato il da 1052 a 1056 nel Francia, il suo padre, Roger de Montgomery, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Mabel Talvas, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Agnes de Ponthieu prima del 9 settembre 1087. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 8 maggio 1118, nel Wareham, Dorset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert II de Bellêmeがから1052年まで1056年にフランスで生まれた時，父Roger de Montgomeryは34歳，母Mabel Talvasは31歳であった。1087年9月9日以前にAgnes de Ponthieuと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1118年5月8日にイギリスドールセトワーエハムで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert II de Bellême(이)가 1052년 부터 1056년 까지 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Montgomery(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Mabel Talvas(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1087년 9월 9일 이전 Agnes de Ponthieu(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1118년 5월 8일 영국 도르세트 워함에서 사망했다.

lv.from 1052 to 1056–8 May 1118: no 1052. gada līdz 1056. gadam–1118. gada 8. maijs

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert II de Bellême nasceu de 1052 a 1056, em França, seu pai, Roger de Montgomery, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Mabel Talvas, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes de Ponthieu antes 9 de setembro de 1087. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 8 de maio de 1118, em Wareham, Dorset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert II de Bellême родился с 1052 по 1056 в местности Франция, его отцу по имени Roger de Montgomery было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Mabel Talvas, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes de Ponthieu перед 9 сентябрь 1087 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 8 мая 1118 г. в местности варэам, дорсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert II de Bellême nació desde 1052 hasta 1056, en Francia, su papá, Roger de Montgomery, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Mabel Talvas, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Agnes de Ponthieu antes de 9 de septiembre de 1087. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 8 de mayo de 1118, en Wareham, Dorset, Inglaterra.
